items.name: chart-1
items.title: Sales Performance Chart
items.description: Clean and simple bar and line chart displaying monthly sales volume and conversion rate trends with dual y-axis visualization

items.name: chart-2
items.title: Revenue & Growth Analytics Chart
items.description: Modern combined bar and line chart showing revenue performance vs targets with growth percentage trends, featuring interactive time period filters and comprehensive metrics dashboard

items.name: chart-3
items.title: Analytics Dashboard Chart
items.description: Comprehensive analytics dashboard chart with product sales and volume metrics, featuring trend indicators and recent activity tracking

items.name: chart-4
items.title: Multi-Tab Financial Dashboard
items.description: Interactive financial dashboard with tabbed navigation showing Income (area chart), Expenses (radial chart), and Profit (bar chart) with real-time metrics

items.name: chart-5
items.title: Earnings Timeline Dashboard
items.description: Time-based earnings dashboard with interactive time period tabs (1d, 5d, 1m, 6m, 1y) and area chart visualization with recent activity tracking

items.name: chart-6
items.title: Leading Companies Dashboard
items.description: Radial progress chart dashboard showcasing company performance metrics with department breakdown and visitor statistics

items.name: datatable-1
items.title: Users List Datatable
items.description: Comprehensive user management table with search, filters, pagination, and action dropdowns. Includes user avatars, roles, login status, and two-factor authentication badges

items.name: datatable-2
items.title: User Records with Stats Datatable
items.description: Advanced user records table with statistics cards, role icons, plan details, and status management. Features filter dropdowns, bulk actions, and comprehensive pagination

items.name: datatable-3
items.title: Products Inventory Datatable
items.description: Product inventory management table with images, SKU tracking, quantity badges, star ratings, and status indicators. Includes stock alerts and product actions

items.name: datatable-4
items.title: Advanced Orders Management Dashboard
items.description: Modern orders datatable with analytics cards, command palette (⌘K), tabs navigation, bulk actions, column visibility control, and real-time order tracking. Features multi-filter system, sortable columns, payment methods, priority levels, and comprehensive status workflow management.
